title: rubus naumannii
intro: Rubus naumannii, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Naumann's raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas and surrounding regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus naumannii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is also used in various herbal preparations, including infusions and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
